_comment: Microsoft Entra External ID — token-augmentation custom authentication extension that calls the eIDAS bridge to inject 'country', 'eidasLoA' and 'nationalIdHash' claims into the issued ID token. Substitutes the legacy B2C 'eidas-bridge-claims.xml' technical profile.
_todo_case_study_scaffold: Deploy the eIDAS bridge as an Azure Function or Container App, then substitute eidas-bridge-function-url and eidas-bridge-app-id.
Grant the External tenant's first-party 'CustomAuthenticationExtensionClient' permission to call the bridge.
